MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-25-2024 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT ROSS STORES, INC.'S Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Nolan R. Jones, Esq., of Dreyer Babich Buccola Wood Campora, LLP, (916) 379-3500, for Plaintiff.
Michael P. Johnson, Esq., of Frassetto Law LLP, (510) 817-0466, for Defendant.

Both parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem and authorize the clerk to execute the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (525/JPT)
